channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Philadelphia prepares for NFC Championship game
item.description: Just two more sleeps until the Eagles take on the Washington Commanders in the NFC Championship Game on Sunday at the Linc. The Birds are just one way away from punching their ticket to the Superbowl.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Cristelli, PHL 17

item.title: Connecticut lawmaker introduces bill that would legalize sports betting on flights to, from state
item.description: A bill in Connecticut aims to legalize sports betting on flights to and from the state, despite other state's laws on gambling on contests.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Novak Djokovic vows to strive for more Grand Slam titles at age 37 after his latest injury
item.description: Novak Djokovic is 37 and was forced to stop playing because of an injury at two of the past four Grand Slam tournaments.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Djokovic quits mid-match and walks off to boos, putting Zverev in Australian Open final vs. Sinner
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Spectators booed an injured Novak Djokovic as he left the court in Rod Laver Arena after quitting one set into his Australian Open semifinal against Alexander Zverev on Friday.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: UTMB Health Athlete of the Week: Episcopal’s Aiden Fyfe
item.description: Fyfe is enjoying a breakout sophomore campaign as on of the leaders of the Knights boys basketball team
item.dc:creator: Randy McIlvoy, KPRC 2

item.title: UTMB Health Athlete of the Week: Stafford High’s Maxwell Frels excels in academics and basketball
item.description: Maxwell Frels, a standout student-athlete from Stafford High School, has been recognized as the UTMB Health Athlete of the Week.
item.dc:creator: Chancellor Johnson, KPRC 2

item.title: Ovechkin moves within 20 goals of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record, Capitals beat Kraken 3-0
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Alex Ovechkin moved within 20 goals of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record with an empty-netter, helping the Washington Capitals beat the Seattle Kraken 3-0 on Thursday night for their sixth straight victory. Ovechkin scored his 22nd goal of the season to push his career total to 875.
item.dc:creator: ALLYSON BALLARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Nikola Jokic hits 66-foot heave to highlight his 5th straight triple-double
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic took an inbounds pass with 1.7 seconds left in the third quarter, turned and let fly with a 66-foot heave that got all net at the other end. He casually walked over to his bench as his teammates mobbed him and the sold-out arena erupted.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KELLY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Military heroes honored at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The Farmers Insurance Open is not just showcasing some of the world’s best golfers — it’s also paying tribute to the heroes of our nation, offering service members special access and recognition throughout the week.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Welcome to the mobile age: NFL conference title games filled with dual-threat QBs
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen loves retelling the story of how he screwed up on what may go down as the NFL’s signature highlight of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Profar agrees to $42M, 3-year contract with Braves, a year after getting $1M deal with Padres
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jurickson Profar agreed to a $42 million, three-year contract with the Atlanta Braves on Thursday, less than a year after the outfielder got a $1 million deal from the San Diego Padres with spring training already underway.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Welcome home, Wemby: As expected, Spurs' star gets a hero's welcome in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The first enormous roar from the crowd came before the game even started. All Victor Wembanyama needed to do to get the fans in Paris into a full-blown frenzy was, it turned out, say hello into a microphone. The cheering just from that lasted about 30 seconds. Welcome home, Wemby.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawsuit says ex-Yankee Mariano Rivera failed to protect a girl from sexual abuse at a church camp
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York Yankees legend Mariano Rivera and his wife are accused in a lawsuit of failing to protect a young girl who was sexually abused by an older child during a summer camp trip sponsored by their church.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Runnin' Utes crushed by #7 Houston, 70-36
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Riding a three-game winning streak, the Runnin' Utes had gained some confidence the last couple of weeks. But Wednesday night against #7 Houston, the Utes came crashing back down to Earth. Milos Uzan scored 14 points, L.J. Cryer added 13 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Students receive career lessons at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: About 30 local students got more than a chance to watch golf at Torrey Pines on Wednesday — they got valuable career insights that could shape their futures.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles selling snow collected from NFC divisional win
item.description: The snow was collected, carefully preserved and authenticated by the grounds crew to allow fans to own a genuine piece of Eagles history, the team said.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, NewsNation

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card
item.description: Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Lions OC Ben Johnson as next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears are reportedly finalizing a deal to hire Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson as their new head coach.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
